case_title: HOMESTEAD SAVINGS AND LOAN VS RODRIGUEZ MAGALY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $707.20 FILED BY HOMESTEAD SAVINGS AND LOAN AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MAGALY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOMESTEAD SAVINGS AND LOAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MAGALY $713.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $748.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MAGALY
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $765.66 AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ MAGALY
